title: Western Analysis used in Oxidative Stress Protocols
author: Eva Feldman
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8bbhsin

steps.title: Wash & dry plates
steps.instruction: Wash & dry plates.

steps.title: Assemble rig and fill plates with...
steps.instruction: Assemble rig and fill plates with H ² O to check for leaks.

steps.title: Pour off water and wipe dry with kimwipe
steps.instruction: Pour off water and wipe dry with kimwipe.

steps.title: Load gel to about the top of the door
steps.instruction: Load gel to about the top of the door.

steps.title: Add 2-propanol to cover the edge
steps.instruction: Add 2-propanol to cover the edge.

steps.title: Wait ~ 40 minutes to polymerize
steps.instruction: Wait ~ 40 minutes to polymerize.

steps.title: Thaw samples on ice
steps.instruction: Thaw samples on ice.

steps.title: When gel is ready, pour off...
steps.instruction: When gel is ready, pour off 2-propanol and rinse with H ² O.

steps.title: Remove excess H ² O with a kimwipe
steps.instruction: Remove excess H ² O with a kimwipe.

steps.title: Prepare and load stacking gel and...
steps.instruction: Prepare and load stacking gel and insert comb making sure there are no bubbles under the teeth.

steps.title: Put a beaker of water on...
steps.instruction: Put a beaker of water on the hot plate to boil.

steps.title: Prepare samples
steps.instruction: Prepare samples: ♦ Plasma - dilute 2µL plasma in 198µL (1:50) RIPA buffer + inhibitors in a labeled screw top tube. Sonicate on 5. Pull off 10µL for Protein analysis. Add 38µL 10X samples buffer to the 190µL lysate. ♦ DRG and Sciatic nerve - DRG - After removing 4 DRG for TRAP assay, pool the remaining DRG in a labeled screw top tube. Sciatic nerve - Place 1 sciatic nerve into a labeled screw top tube. Add 110µL RIPA buffer + inhibitors. Sonicate on 8 on ice. Freeze samples, thaw and run through a 1mL syringe with a 26g needle. Repeat Freeze, thaw and running through syringe. Pull off 10µL for Protein analysis. Add 20µL 10X sample buffer to the 100µL lysate.

steps.title: Label screw top tubes for markers
steps.instruction: Label screw top tubes for markers.

steps.title: Do protein analysis on samples
steps.instruction: Do protein analysis on samples. Generally load 20 to 50µg

steps.title: Add 2µL 10X sample buffer to 10µl rainbow protein marker
steps.instruction: Add 2µL 10X sample buffer to 10µl rainbow protein marker. (times x for x # of gels)

steps.title: Boil samples and markers for 5 minutes and cool
steps.instruction: Boil samples and markers for 5 minutes and cool.

steps.title: When gel is done gently remove combs
steps.instruction: When gel is done gently remove combs.

steps.title: Assemble rig with short plate on...
steps.instruction: Assemble rig with short plate on the inside, press down and close doors.

steps.title: Fill inside chamber with running buffer...
steps.instruction: Fill inside chamber with running buffer to about ½ way between top of sm & lg plate and make sure there are no leaks.

steps.title: Pour more running buffer into outside...
steps.instruction: Pour more running buffer into outside of rig to the bottom of the gate.

steps.title: Load rainbow protein marker and samples
steps.instruction: Load rainbow protein marker and samples.

steps.title: Set volts @ 200 and run for 50-60 minutes
steps.instruction: Set volts @ 200 and run for 50-60 minutes.

steps.title: Remove gel from rig, remove wells...
steps.instruction: Remove gel from rig, remove wells and soak gel in transfer buffer for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Cut and label nitrocellulose membrane to...
steps.instruction: Cut and label nitrocellulose membrane to size and soak in transfer buffer.

steps.title: In another dish, soak 2 fiber...
steps.instruction: In another dish, soak 2 fiber pads and 2 pieces of whatman paper for each gel.

steps.title: Assemble the sandwich with black side...
steps.instruction: Assemble the sandwich with black side down in transfer buffer, making sure there are no bubbles between each layer put 1 fiber pad, 1 whatman paper, gel, nitrocellulose, 1 whatman paper, and 1 fiber pad.

steps.title: Put a stir bar in the...
steps.instruction: Put a stir bar in the bottom of the rig and place the sandwich in the transfer unit with the black part in the back. (Protein runs from black to red, to the membrane)

steps.title: Fill the ice pack and place behind the sandwich
steps.instruction: Fill the ice pack and place behind the sandwich.

steps.title: Fill the unit with 1X transfer...
steps.instruction: Fill the unit with 1X transfer buffer until the ice pack floats or the top of the lower ledge.

steps.title: Transfer at 100V for 1 hour...
steps.instruction: Transfer at 100V for 1 hour (100kd-30kd) or 69V for very low proteins

steps.title: Rinse the membrane in 1X TBS for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Rinse the membrane in 1X TBS for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Block overnight @ 4º or at...
steps.instruction: Block overnight @ 4º or at RT for 2 hours in TBST/milk for polyclonal antibodies or TBST/BSA for mAbs.

steps.title: Quick rinse once with TBST
steps.instruction: Quick rinse once with TBST.

steps.title: Incubate 2 hours at RT or...
steps.instruction: Incubate 2 hours at RT or overnight @ 4º in primary antibody in TBST/milk or TBST/BSA on rocker. (Primary antibody can be re-used)

steps.title: Wash 3x’s for 5 minutes with TBST
steps.instruction: Wash 3x’s for 5 minutes with TBST.

steps.title: Incubate for 2 hour in secondary...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 2 hour in secondary antibody in TBST/milk or TBST/BSA.

steps.title: Quick rinse once with TBST
steps.instruction: Quick rinse once with TBST.

steps.title: Wash 3x’s for 5 minutes each in TBST
steps.instruction: Wash 3x’s for 5 minutes each in TBST.

steps.title: Wash 20 minutes in 1X TBS
steps.instruction: Wash 20 minutes in 1X TBS.

steps.title: In a 15mL conical tube, develop...
steps.instruction: In a 15mL conical tube, develop with small cell signaling bottles using 9mL H ² O and 500µL of each reagent. Expose for 1 minute.

steps.title: Develop film
steps.instruction: Develop film.
